scripts.dev: concurrently --names backend,frontend --prefix-colors blue,green "npm run dev --prefix tip-share-pro-backend" "npm run dev --prefix tip-share-pro-app"
scripts.start: concurrently --names backend,frontend "npm start --prefix tip-share-pro-backend" "npm start --prefix tip-share-pro-app"
scripts.install:all: cd tip-share-pro-backend && npm ci && cd ../tip-share-pro-app && npm ci
scripts.db:push: cd tip-share-pro-backend && npx prisma db push
scripts.db:setup: npm run db:push && npm run db:seed
